structural_claim: Collective behavior emerges from microscopic dynamics through statistical averaging, where macroscopic properties become independent of microscopic details

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Macroscopic thermodynamic properties emerge from probability distributions over microstates
Near critical points, microscopic details become irrelevant and systems organize into universal classes
Collective behavior emerges from many-body Coulomb interactions, creating macroscopic screening independent of individual particle trajectories
Plasma dynamics is fully described by phase space distribution function evolution, showing macroscopic behavior emerges from statistical treatment
